description.ko: 알려진 우주의 가장 먼 곳에 위치한 VOID-3는 우주 심연의 압도적인 압력 속에서 별들이 고요하게 탄생하는 과정을 관찰합니다.
description.en: Positioned at the farthest reaches of the known universe, VOID-3 observes the silent birth of stars within the crushing pressure of the cosmic deep.

prompt: VOID-3 exploration unit drifting in the absolute center of a dark nebula, cosmic deep theme, obsidian and deep violet color palette, bioluminescent cyan energy veins pulsing across mechanical frame, floating through star-dusted debris, cinematic lighting, 8k, hyper-detailed surface textures, surreal celestial atmosphere.
